title: epipactis albensis subsp. rivularis
intro: Epipactis albensis subsp. rivularis, a lesser-known orchid, is a subspecies of the Epipactis albensis plant, which belongs to the Orchidaceae family. It is a rare and delicate species found in specific regions, often used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to offer various health benefits, including soothing digestive issues and reducing fever. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions or decoctions, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
